Requirement Statement: The Bank shall maintain an approved Enterprise Technology Policy that governs technology decisions standards procedures and evidence expectations.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC Management; OCC Heightened Standards; COBIT

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require ARB review before material technology change implementation.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC AIO; OCC Heightened Standards; TOGAF

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall maintain an authoritative architecture repository for standards patterns decisions and architecture artifacts.
The Bank shall maintain a canonical object schema for policies standards requirements controls evidence exceptions and architecture objects.
The Bank shall maintain a Master Document Register for controlled technology policy and standard artifacts.
The Bank shall maintain a Master Requirements Register for all mandatory technology policy requirements.
The Bank shall maintain a Master Control Register mapping policy requirements to control objectives owners evidence and audit method.
The Bank shall maintain a Regulatory Traceability Matrix mapping requirements and controls to regulatory and framework obligations.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC; OCC; FDIC; FRB; NIST; CIS; ISO

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall maintain architecture principles with categories principles patterns and practices to guide architecture decisions.
The Bank shall map material technology changes to business capabilities and business services.
The Bank shall maintain application portfolio records including owner lifecycle state criticality risk and strategic disposition.
The Bank shall classify technologies by lifecycle state and manage adoption tolerance containment sunset retirement and prohibition decisions.
The Bank shall identify track and remediate technologies approaching end-of-life or end-of-support.
The Bank shall require cloud architectures to follow approved landing zone identity network data resilience logging and cost governance patterns.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC AIO; NIST CSF; CIS; ISO 27001

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require infrastructure architectures to document hosting topology capacity resilience security boundaries and operational support model.
The Bank shall require network architectures to document segmentation routing security controls ingress egress and resilience requirements.
The Bank shall require security architecture review for material technology changes and high-risk patterns.
The Bank shall require identity access authentication authorization and privileged access patterns to be defined for material systems.
The Bank shall require data classification protection encryption retention and privacy controls to be identified for material solutions.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: GLBA; SEC Reg S-P; NIST 800-53; ISO

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require APIs integrations and events to follow approved standards for ownership versioning security observability and reuse.
The Bank shall integrate policy standards controls and evidence requirements into software engineering and DevSecOps lifecycle gates.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: NIST SSDF; NIST CSF; CIS; FFIEC

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require an architecture evidence pack for material ARB decisions.
The Bank shall document approve time-bound and monitor all exceptions and waivers to technology policy standards or controls.
The Bank shall require material solutions to document availability recovery continuity dependency and failover expectations.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FRB Operational Resilience; FFIEC; NIST CSF

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require backup recovery retention and restoration evidence for material systems and data stores.
The Bank shall require observability logging alerting telemetry and support model requirements for material systems.
The Bank shall require architecture and risk review for third-party products SaaS managed services and externally hosted technology.
The Bank shall require buy versus build decisions to evaluate strategic fit integration complexity risk cost control obligations and lifecycle impact.
The Bank shall require AI and emerging technology use cases to follow approved governance risk security data privacy and model oversight requirements.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: NIST AI RMF; Model Risk Guidance; FFIEC

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall align architecture intent application records technology services and configuration items to the approved CMDB and CSDM model.
The Bank shall maintain architecture roles skills communities of practice and knowledge sharing mechanisms required to operate the framework.
The Bank shall report technology policy architecture standards lifecycle exception and control-plane metrics to accountable governance stakeholders.
Regulatory / Framework Mapping: FFIEC Management; OCC; COBIT; NIST CSF
